Title: User Registration

Preconditions: App installed on device, existing account
Test Steps:
1. Open the app at startup.
2. Click on "Login" option.
3. Enter email and password in the login form.
Expected Result: System checks the database for the account and redirects to the main screen if found.

Title: Start Trip
Test Steps:
1. Press the start trip button.
2. The system begins calculating the distance traveled using GPS.
Expected Result: Real-time calculation of kilometers driven and CO2 emitted starts.

Title: End Trip
Test Steps:
1. Press the end trip button.
2. The system stops the distance and CO2 calculation.
Expected Result: Displays fuel consumption and CO2 emitted on the screen.

Title: Calculate Distance
Test Steps: 1. During the trip, the system continuously calculates the distance traveled.
Expected Result: Distance traveled is calculated in real-time.

Title: Calculate Emissions
Test Steps: 1. During the trip, the system calculates CO2 emissions based on distance and vehicle type.
Expected Result: CO2 emissions are calculated in real-time.

Title: View Emissions Report
Test Steps:

2. The system displays a report showing distance traveled, CO2 emissions, and date of the trip.
Expected Result: Report with distance, emissions, and date is shown to the user.
